CustomField.description: When checked, execution time is always logged for this action regardless of whether it exceeds the threshold. Overrides both the action-level and object-level threshold settings. Useful for monitoring specific actions during performance investigations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to always log execution time for this action, even when it runs below the threshold. Useful for monitoring specific actions during performance investigations.
CustomField.label: Force Performance Logging
